name: glass-wipe
title: glassWipe
description: The incoming scene wipes in from a direction behind a frosted-glass edge that sharpens as it settles, while the outgoing scene frosts over beneath it. Calmer than a hard wipe, more textured than a cross-fade. Onda-original.
pickWhen: a directional wipe that should feel material — premium product, brand pieces. Use `wipe` for harder edge; `cross-fade` for no edge.
